title: Mystic Moments | Exotic Fruit Fragrance Oil - 10ml - Perfect for Soaps, Candles, Bath Bombs, Oil Burners, Diffusers and Skin & Hair Care Items
features: A tangy, fresh that provides many exotic aromas; an explosion of flavours; orange, pineapple, mango and pomegranate!
Our Fragrance Oils have been specifically formulated to be suitable for soaps, candles, bath bombs, oil burners, diffusers and both skin & hair care items; Do not use on skin undiluted
Our collection of Fragrance Oils are available in a diverse number of sizes to suit your needs. Whether buying for yourself, a friend or a loved one, you’ll find the right product
Proudly bottled in the UK; To increase Fragrance Oil life, we have opted to use an amber UV-resistant glass bottle with a built-in dropper for application
Safety Data Sheet, IFRA Document, Allergen Document and CLP Labels are all available on request
description: Product Description Mystic Moments Exotic Fruit Fragrance Oil Exotic Fruit Fragrance Oil offers a tangy, fresh aroma with sweet notes of orange, pineapple, mango, and pomegranate. Perfect for creating a lively and uplifting atmosphere. Tangy, fresh exotic fruit aroma Sweet notes of orange, mango, and more Ideal for energising your space From Aromatherapy to Soap Making: Discover Fragrance Oil Applications AROMATHERAPY Use Mystic Moments fragrance oils in a diffuser or oil burner for aromatherapy, promoting relaxation and creating a soothing ambiance DIY BEAUTY PRODUCTS Add Mystic Moments fragrance oils to DIY beauty products like body butter or lotion for a unique, long-lasting scent. Mix and match to suit your style HOME FRAGRANCE Mystic Moments fragrance oils freshen your home as air fresheners or linen sprays, offering a variety of scents to suit any mood or occasion. SOAP & CANDLE MAKING Mystic Moments oils add fragrance and luxury to candles and soaps. Add a few drops before pouring, and always follow safety guidelines for proper use. Explore Versatile Scents in Every Size Wide Variety of Scents With an extensive range of fragrances to choose from, you can easily find the perfect scent for any occasion. Whether you prefer floral, fruity, earthy, or exotic aromas, Mystic Moments offers something to suit every preference. Larger Size Bottles Available Mystic Moments Fragrance Oils come in various sizes, from 10ml to 1kg, perfect for personal use or larger projects like candle making. Whether you're trying a new scent or creating unique blends, our high-quality, long-lasting oils offer the flexibility and quantity you need for any project. What are fragrance oils used for? Fragrance oils are used for home fragrance, DIY beauty products like soaps and lotions, candle making, and aromatherapy. They provide long-lasting, pleasant scents in any setting. What’s the difference between fragrance oils and essential oils? Fragrance oils are synthetic and ideal for scenting, while essential oils are natural plant extracts often used for therapeutic purposes in aromatherapy. Can I mix different fragrance oils together? Yes, you can mix different fragrance oils to create custom scents! Experiment with blending oils to find your perfect combination, whether for home fragrance, DIY beauty, or candles. Are Mystic Moments fragrance oils safe for skin? Yes, when properly diluted. Mix a few drops into a carrier oil or base product like lotion before applying to the skin. Avoid using undiluted to prevent irritation.
